div.h1: Perplexity Comparison: FP16 vs Naive INT4 vs GPTQ INT4

p.em: WikiText-2 Evaluation on 7B Parameter Model (Llama-2 architecture)

div.p: GPTQ Algorithm (One-Shot Quantization): GPTQ minimizes weight error $|Wx - \hat{W}x|^2$ by processing weights in blocks. It uses the Inverse Hessian ($H^{-1}$) to adjust unquantized weights to compensate for rounding errors in quantized ones.
This preserves the activation distributions needed for coherent language generation.
